meaning: n.伯明翰(城市名,有二,其一在美国阿拉巴马州中北部,另一在英格兰中部)
examples: Birmingham is now going to be redeveloped again.
Birmingham has bid to stage the next national athletics championships.
Trials of more extensive, all-day litter patrols were underway in Manchester and Birmingham.
He once employed an agency carer to assist him at a Maximo Park rock concert in Birmingham.
Speaking at the conference in Birmingham, Mr Cameron said Britain's success at the London Olympics showed "something important".
